name: websearch
description: Embeddable, budget-capped, Google-grade web search for a Node/TS AI engine. Drop-in-ish for the Tavily SDK. Includes embeddings/Cohere reranker, Readability extraction, $-cap + free fallback, Redis for multi-replica.

scripts.test: npm run build && node test/smoke-soft.mjs && node test/smoke-hard.mjs && node test/smoke-cap-free.mjs && node test/smoke-rerank.mjs && node test/smoke-extract.mjs
